createOrg.title: Set up your workspace
createOrg.description: Tell us about your business so we can personalise your experience.

connectBank.title: Connect your bank
connectBank.description: Link your business account to automatically import transactions. You can always do this later.
connectBank.connectedDescription: Your bank account has been linked. Transactions will start syncing in the background.

reconciliation.title: How it works
reconciliation.description: Here's what happens once your bank is connected.

bullets.categorize: Expenses and income are categorised intelligently
bullets.receipts: Receipts are matched to transactions via Telegram
bullets.alerts: You get notified about anomalies and recurring patterns

connectChat.title: Connect Telegram
connectChat.description: Send receipts and invoices directly from your phone. Generate a code and send it to our Telegram bot to link your account.
connectChat.sendToBot: Send this code to the Telegram bot to link your account.
